mapper.select: SELECT r.* FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.sort_no

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != '' AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND rm.is_deleted = 0 AND ur.is_deleted = 0
